titleStmt.title: SII 25.268: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 268. (A.R. No. 268 of 1908.) KARIVAḶAMVANDANALLŪR, SANKARANAYINAR KOYIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Pālvaṇṇanāthasvāmi temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ Śiṟi Perumāḷ Śīvalamāṟavar Guṇarāmaṉ alias Pāṇḍya Kulaśēkhara-Dīṭshakar Śaka 1574: Regnal year 37.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 37th year of the reign of the above king. The other details of date viz., Śaka 1574, Nandana, Āvaṇi 4 correspond to 1652 A.D., August 4, (Wednesday).

It records the grant of land to Vararāma Vikkiṟamapāṇḍiya-Mūrkuḍikōvaikāṟaṉ, the śrībaṇḍārak-kāriyañcheyvār of the temple of Tirukkaḷāvuḍaiya-tambirāṉār, for the kaṭṭaḷai, in lieu of 25 poṉ given by him for the performance of worship to the deity. It is stated that Gaṇapatipaṇḍāram was to conduct the above mentioned kaṭṭaḷai. The details of lands at Karuvarainallūr given by the śrīkāryam-cheyvār are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāttam 1000 5 100 7 10 4ṉ meṟ cellāniṉṟa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravatti koṉeri
nmai koṇṭāṉ ciṟiperumāḷ civalamāṟavar kuṇarāṉāṉa pāṇṭiyakula
cekara tiṭṣakarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 7ṉ meṟ cellāniṉṟa nantaṉa Āvaṇi mātam
4 cuvāmi tirukkaḷāvuṭaiya tampirāṉār koyiṟ cipaṇṭārakkāriyañ ceyvār
kaḷ vārāma vikkiṟamapāṇṭiya mūrtti cervaikāṟaṉukkuk kaṭṭaḷaikku
nilam viṭṭukkoṭuttatukku viparam . Ivar cuvāmi pūcaikku Irupattañcu poṉ
koṭupaṭiyiṉāle karuvarainallūrp periyakuḷam Akavayalil melai vī
tiyil Ulataṭi �1 1muntiri Orumā rūpāy l taṭi kavikaḷ Alataṭi kala �
taṭi 2 � (1/2) Akattaṭi � rūpāy Inta � koṭṭai Añcum Ivar kaṇapati
ppaṇṭāram vāricamākak kaṭṭaḷai naṭattivarak kaṭṭaḷai yiṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle
kaṇapatippaṇṭāram cantirātittavarai cantatip piṟavecam kaṭṭaḷai naṭatti varu
vārākavum Itukku Iṭaiyūṟu coṉṉavaṉ kaṅkaik karaiyile kāraāmpacu
vaik koṉṟa toṣattile povāṉākavum Ippaṭikku Āticaṇṭecuraṉ §
Digital edition of SII 25.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
